legal_basis.summary: The local authority shall prohibit open burning of solid waste on streets, open spaces, and at landfill sites.
legal_basis.action: Issue prohibitory notice; direct immediate extinguishment and capping of the burning face; initiate penalty proceedings.
legal_basis.penalty: Environmental compensation as per CPCB/NGT schedule for open burning of waste.

legal_basis.statute: Air (Prevention and Control of Pollution) Act, 1981
legal_basis.summary: Power to issue directions, including closure, prohibition or regulation of any industry, operation or process, and stoppage of electricity or water supply.
legal_basis.action: Issue direction under s.31A; consider stoppage of operations pending compliance.

legal_basis.summary: Graded restrictions on construction, DG sets and dust-generating activity, escalating with the AQI band.
legal_basis.action: Apply the GRAP stage corresponding to the prevailing AQI band in this ward.
